name: bexa
description: SKILL.md files that turn AI coding agents into Senior Design Engineers. Non-generic, minimalist, animated, professional frontends.
author: BekhruzTursunboev

skills.name: forge
skills.description: All-purpose professional frontend skill. Non-generic layouts, curated typography, HSL color system, motion depth scale, and 12-point quality gate. Start here for any web project.

skills.name: forge-dashboard
skills.description: Admin panels, analytics dashboards, and SaaS internals. Data visualization standards, command palette, KPI layouts, and high-density information architecture.

skills.name: forge-mobile
skills.description: Native-grade mobile design. Thumb zone architecture, gesture physics with Reanimated 3, haptic feedback, platform-specific motion (iOS vs Android), and performance mandates.

skills.name: forge-motion
skills.description: Advanced motion and animation. 5 named spring configs, Framer Motion patterns, GSAP scrolltelling with cleanup, Three.js WebGL, and prefers-reduced-motion compliance.
